title: Most commonly asked HR and managerial round questions for Job Interviews
author: Priya
content:
Job Highlights 


 • If you are given some high priority task how will you ensure to do it effectively ? 

~ My laidback delivery of work could narrow down my work performance and could be wrongly estimated by others.So,whatever work is assigned to me I will make sure to deliver it on time and won’t give eveluator any chance of complaint.


 • How long do you think you will be working for us if you are hired?

 ~ If I am joining any organization than I will not set an impression of leaving it .I will be with that organization for the time till company wants me to work for them.And I will value the morals and principles of company whichever hires me and would try to be a responsible and long time employee of that company.and would serve that company as an abiding employee to meet all needs and aspirations that a company wants from its employees to fulfill. So,If u hired me I would work for your company as a trusted and reliable employee who would work with u like an inseparable part of your company.


 • what if you are not selected for this job ? 

~ I won’t regret at all even if I am not selected for this job but after going through the interview process I get this realization that no matter how big your success trail is but you should always strive to do better.Selection or rejection is a phase of your long journey in making a career but we should never get intimidated of failures because I believe one day or the other success will come at your feet.


 • If you are an employer with a workforce of 10000 employees how will you run the company. 

                                 Or 

What changes would you make if you come on board. 

 ~ If I have to run a company I would first see the entire portfolio of that company and would find ways to make company grow to further heights .And for the capitalisation and growth of the company employees are the biggest resource . So,I will intensify my focus mainly on their upliftment and professional development. And on a broader note budgeting and financing will also be my main concern to pace up company’s revenue for high turnover to maintain good payroll for all my employees.


 • How confident are you that you will be selected for this post/position ? 

~ I am not confident at all.And our selection or rejection is in the hands of interviewer .We can only give our best to increase our chances of getting selected .And I won’t regret even if I am not selected today .I will do my self evaluation that where I am lacking and what else I could do to increase my future prospect of being selected. 


 • Anything that annoys you or make you in frenzy.

 ~ I get annoyed when I see someone pulling on others seeing their inability to do something. And I really hate such peoples who thinks that they r well equipped with all knowledge set and seek nobody’s guidance pertaining to Anything. And we can’t demean someone just for a little fame bcoz everybody is competent enough competent enough to show their true self with their talent and Excellency.


 • How will you rate me as an interviewer ? 

 ~ The manner in which u asked questions I felt that u r so possessive about the company and u don’t want us to get hired without thoroughly evaluating us to see how capable we r to hold this company in times of need. And u kept on interviewing me till u become complacent enough to find a right candidate for your company.On a count if 10 I would rate u 9 because i think u should be a little considerate of our well being. Just by asking few questions u can get an impression that whether we r right match for your company or not but by rejecting us u destroyed our years of hard work that we put to contribute for your company and that desperation for the candidate may de motivate them in levelling up their career for the next available opportunity 


 • How will you describe success and failure in your word ? 

 ~ For me success is any stage where u find contentment in achieving something.If u r satisfied with the outcome of your work and u feel that what u worked for is actually paid off.And I think there is no definite point where u can claim your success because everybody chase after 1 thing or the other and this chain goes on relentlessly.So,I think nobody knows what success is bcoz there is no limit to our infatuation towards anything and what we call success is just a way to cajole your heart.And at every stage of our life we will find something missing in us and that is what left behind in paving Your way to what u call success. When we give up on something without making any trial in succeeding it than i think that’s our biggest failure bcoz we r conceding our defeat without giving any extra effort in getting through it.There can be things that may seem difficult at 1 point but there is nothing which is beyond your competence.So, failure is just a state of mind where instead of finding ways in delivering your work exceptionally well u try to put that off or don’t show any courage in accomplishing it.


 • Can you work under night shifts or weekends. ? 

 ~ If my job requires me to work down the line in the most critical hours of my time i would manage to make all amends to give time and energy for the work where i am highly required .And to create a meaningful impact in my organisation of my work i can work on rotational shifts including night or in weekends. 

 • Your long term , mid term, short term goals. 

~ My short term goal is to start my career journey with a good ,well defined job for me to make me financially strong and technically skilled with every piece of knowledge that an individual needs to advance in their career.By making my work my passion that could pay me in my tough days of struggle will be my bedrock and a foundation for a scalable growth for my future .

~ My mid term goal is to be professionally well off with all acquired skills and rightful knowledge that could help me in dealing with every roadblocks and tough challenges of my work and by being a problem solver for my team who gave their equal share of their time on the backfoot to support the project..

~ My long term goal is to succeed in my working field in which I have given my heart and soul to get through it.and to gain all that wealth , professional excellence to earn a goodwill out of my hard work infront of others. Reaching to a good height of my career at a top level position where I could take important decisions for the company in its growth is my hope and dream to fulfill.And I know I still have to go too far to reach to that point of my career but I will keep myself involved in every important work of the company and would toe the career line to get to that level of success.


 • Describe the workplace where you’ll be most happy and productive.                             

                                          Or 

 How an Ideal workplace should be like according to you. 

~ If we have a working environment ultra rich ,clean it provokes positivity and generates soft, healthy vibes around .And when we have a working place with all those necessities of nature and coolant we get absorbed in its natural,eco vibes and be more mindful and focused towards work.And if I get to modernise my office place I will customise it with things of my likings.That could be with some greenery around me of flowers, by designing gallery of godly, divine images and articles at my desk which are more compelling and thoughtful to make me feel more confident and energized with my work .

So,my ideal workplace would be a bit highly personalized that could give me a homely feel with an aura of nature friendly vibes and a cool atmospheric presence with memorable artifacts,wall hangings and crafted materials to keep me present at my work at all time 


 • Money or work which is more important. 

~ Both money and work has equal presence in our life . Money can give us a life of luxury ,joy and happiness but not without work.Because any wealth which is acquired by free means is only a blank sheet of paper in the eyes of others because that wealth of yours may buy u all rest and comfort at your home but not in the society . Because a person is known by their work not the wealth they possess or with their luxury style of living. As Money with no work can be looted money , a Windfall of a winning lottery or just some ancestral wealth infront of others .

 Only money earned with one's sweat and blood spent needfully in the most appropriate way when your necessities comes upfront to all your worldly desires and lavish spending. And squandering money on materialistic things is lll got Ill spent . And such money can only give u a momentary pleasure not a fuller joy for lifetime. So, I would say we should accentuate more to our hardwork than the acquired wealth which can give u a measurable outcome and a pay which is deserving to you .

Important HR and Managerial Interview Tips

  • Maintain confidence and speak clearly during HR and managerial rounds.
  • Use practical examples while answering scenario based and behavioral questions.
  • Prepare answers for strengths, weaknesses, leadership and teamwork questions beforehand.
  • Avoid giving overly negative answers about previous companies or managers.
  • Use professional communication and maintain positive body language during interviews.
  • For managerial interviews, focus on leadership, conflict resolution and decision making abilities.
  • While answering behavioral questions, use the STAR method — Situation, Task, Action and Result.
  • Research the company and job role before appearing for HR interviews.
  • Practice self introduction and project explanation multiple times before the interview.
  • Be honest in your answers instead of using memorized responses.
